title: symphyotrichum novi-belgii var. laevigatus
intro: Symphyotrichum novi-belgii var. laevigatus, also known as Smooth New York Aster, is a perennial plant species native to the northeastern United States. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been attributed to its high content of flavonoids and saponins. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Symphyotrichum novi-belgii var. laevigatus include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
